description: Composition Red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, stitch detailing on the side seams and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little boy launch his flying adventure in style with this red doodle t-shirt. Teach him how to understand various cultures, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sneakers for an even more sporty look.
